Spells-Sorcerer — Female Human Sorcerer: 10
Strength: 16 (+3) Dexterity: 13 (+1) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 19 (+4) Wisdom: 14 (+2) Charisma: 15 (+2)
Background: Sage Alignment: Chaotic Evil Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Intelligence: 2; Strength: 1 Experience: 83291/85000 Level: 10 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 240/480
Ability Notes: Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +4
Feat Count: General: 2; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Sorcerer (Metamagic): 3; Sorcerer (Sorcerer Subclass): 1
Feats: Alert; Magic Initiate (Druid); Savage Attacker Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Sorcerer Features: Distant Spell; Draconic Resilience; Draconic Sorcery; Draconic Spells; Elemental Affinity; Font Of Magic; Heightened Spell; Innate Sorcery; Metamagic; Save Proficiency (Constitution; Charisma); Seeking Spell; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, Religion); Sorcerer Subclass; Sorcerous Restoration; Sorcery Incarnate; Spellcasting; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons) Sage Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Constitution, Intelligence, Wisdom); Magic Initiate (Wizard); Skill Proficiency (Arcana; History); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Metamagic: 3 selections
Sorcerer Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +6 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +8 Investigation: (int) +4 Religion: (int) +4
Athletics: (str) +3 Medicine: (wis) +6 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +4 Stealth: (dex) +5
History: (int) +8 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +2
Skill Proficiency: Arcana; History; Insight; Medicine; Stealth
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Languages: Common; Giant; Infernal
Skill Notes: Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Combat
Hit Points: 53 Initiative: +5 Armor Class: 13
Weapon Proficiency: Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Dagger (+7 1d4+3 P R20/60; Nick); Shortbow (+5 1d6+1 P R80/320; Vex); Sickle (+7 1d4+3 S; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+7 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +4 Initiative
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Draconic Resilience: +10 Hit Points/+2 Armor Class in no armor
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution
Save: Charisma: +6; Constitution: +4; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: +4; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +2
Save Notes: Elemental Affinity: Has resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: D0: 2; D: 1; S0: 6; S: 15; W0: 2; W: 1 Spell Slots: S1: 4; S2: 3; S3: 3; S4: 3; S5: 2 Attack: D: +6; S: +6; W: +8 Spell DC: D: 14; S: 14; W: 16
Spells:
Acid Splash (S0 Evoc): R60' Inflicts 2d6 HP acid (save Dexterity negates) in a 5' radius
Alter Self (S2 Tran): Self becomes aquatic, changes appearance, or gains natural weapons with +6 attack and 1d6+2 HP damage, for concentration up to 1 hr
Alter Self (S2 [Draconic Spells] Tran): Self becomes aquatic, changes appearance, or gains natural weapons with +6 attack and 1d6+2 HP damage, for concentration up to 1 hr
Animate Objects (S5 Tran): R120' 2 Medium (10 hit points; Armor Class 15; +2 attack inflicts 1d4+3 force), 1 Large (20 hit points; Armor Class 15; +2 attack inflicts 2d6+5 HP), or 0 Huge (40 hit points, Armor Class 15; +2 attack inflicts 2d12+5 HP) objects obey mental commands when within 500' for concentration up to 1 min [+Level Medium objects inflict +1d4 HP, Large +1d6 HP, or Huge +1d12 HP]
Arcane Eye (S4 [Draconic Spells] Divi): R30' Self sees with Darkvision through a remote invisible eye that can move 30' per rd for concentration up to 1 hr
Arcane Hand (S5 Evoc): 1
Banishment (S4 Abju): R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; extraplanar creatures don't return if the spell is maintained for a full min [+Level affects +1 target]
Blight (S4 Necr): R30' Inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half; plant target automatically fails) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Blindness/Deafness (S2 Tran): R120' Inflicts a choice of blindness or deafness (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Blink (S3 Tran): Self has a 50% chance of becoming ethereal at the end each turn, returning to a choice of spot within 10' at the start of the next turn, for 1 min
Blur (S2 Illu): Foes suffer disadvantage when using sight to attack self for concentration up to 1 min
Burning Hands (S1 Evoc): 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Chain Lightning (S6 Evoc): R150' Inflicts 10d8 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) on 4 targets in a 30' radius [+Level affects +1 target]
Charm Monster (S4 Ench): R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Charm Monster (S4 [Draconic Spells] Ench): R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Charm Person (S1 Ench): R30' Target humanoid becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Chill Touch (S0 Necr): Touch inflicts 2d10 HP necrotic and target cannot regain hit points until the end of the next turn
Chromatic Orb (S1 Evoc): R90' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder; rolling the same number on 2 damage dice indicates that the spell leaps to attack another target within 30' of the first [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP and can leap +1 times]
Chromatic Orb (S1 [Draconic Spells] Evoc): R90' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder; rolling the same number on 2 damage dice indicates that the spell leaps to attack another target within 30' of the first [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP and can leap +1 times]
Circle Of Death (S6 Necr): R150' 60' radius inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +2d8 HP]
Clairvoyance (S3 Divi): R1 mile Self can choose each rd to see or hear via an invisible sensor for concentration up to 10 min
Cloudkill (S5 Conj): R120' 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP poison (save Constitution half) and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Color Spray (S1 Illu): 15' cone blinds (save Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn
Command (S1 [Draconic Spells] Ench): R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 rd [+Level affects +1 target]
Comprehend Languages (S1 Divi): Self understands all languages for 1 hr [R]
Cone Of Cold (S5 Evoc): 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Confusion (S4 Ench): R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the radius by 5']
Counterspell (S3 Abju): R60' Negates foe casting (save Constitution negates)
Creation (S5 Illu): R30' Creates a 5' cube of false matter lasting 24 hr (vegetable matter), 12 hr (stone or crystal), 1 hr (precious metals), 10 min (gems), or 1 min (adamantine or mithral) [+Level creates a +5' cube]
Dancing Lights (S0 Evoc): R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per rd as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Darkness (S2 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Darkvision (S2 Tran): Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Daylight (S3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Delayed Blast Fireball (S7 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 12d6 HP fire + 1d6 HP fire per rd delayed (save Dexterity half) within concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Demiplane (S8 Conj): R60' Creates a door that leads to a 30'x30'x30' extradimensional room for 1 hr
Detect Magic (S1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Thoughts (S2 Divi): R30' Reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom ends; additional Arcana checks each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 1' of stone, dirt, or wood, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Dimension Door (S4 Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Disguise Self (S1 Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Disintegrate (S6 Tran): R60' Inflicts 10d6+40 HP force and turns the target to dust if reduced to 0 HP (save Dexterity negates), or disintegrates a Large or smaller object or magical force [+Level inflicts +3d6 HP]
Dispel Magic (S3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dominate Beast (S4 Ench): R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7]
Dominate Monster (S8 Ench): R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 8 hr]
Dominate Person (S5 Ench): R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8]
Dragon's Breath (S2 Tran): Touched can use a Magic action to inflict 3d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison (save Dexterity half) in a 15' cone for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Dragon's Breath (S2 [Draconic Spells] Tran): Touched can use a Magic action to inflict 3d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison (save Dexterity half) in a 15' cone for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Earthquake (S8 Tran): R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Elementalism (S0 Tran): R30' Moves air or dust in a 5' cube, creates smoke or mist in a 5' cube for 1 min, or sculpts a 1' cube of dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water for 1 hr
Enhance Ability (S2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Enlarge/Reduce (S2 Tran): R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Etherealness (S7 Conj): Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr [+Level affects +2 or +5 targets at level 8 or 9]
Expeditious Retreat (S1 Tran): Allows self to Dash immediately and then to use a bonus action to Dash each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Eyebite (S6 Necr): R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
False Life (S1 Necr): Self gains 2d4+4 temporary hit points [+Level gives +5 temporary hit points]
Fear (S3 Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Fear (S3 [Draconic Spells] Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Feather Fall (S1 Tran): R60' 5 falling targets slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Finger Of Death (S7 Necr): R60' Target suffers 7d8+30 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) and becomes an obedient zombie if killed
Fire Bolt (S0 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 2d10 HP fire or ignites an unattended flammable target
Fire Shield (S4 Evoc): Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Storm (S7 Evoc): R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Fireball (S3 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flame Blade (S2 Evoc): Self wields a flaming blade that inflicts 3d6+2 HP fire and emits a 10' bright light for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flaming Sphere (S2 Conj): R60' 5' sphere emits a 20' bright light, inflicts 2d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) on creatures within 5', and ignites unattended flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to move it 30', rolling over 5' barriers and jumping 10' gaps [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flesh To Stone (S6 Tran): R60' Target becomes restrained (save Constitution negates), then petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates) for concentration; the effects become permanent after 1 min of concentration
Fly (S3 Tran): Touched gains a 60' fly speed for concentration up to 10 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Fly (S3 [Draconic Spells] Tran): Touched gains a 60' fly speed for concentration up to 10 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Fog Cloud (S1 Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Freezing Sphere (S6 Evoc): 1
Gaseous Form (S3 Tran): Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Gate (S9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Globe Of Invulnerability (S6 Abju): 10' radius blocks spells of level 5 or lower for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the level of spells blocked by 1]
Grease (S1 Conj): R60' 10' sq becomes difficult terrain and causes creatures to fall prone (save Dexterity negates) for 1 min
Greater Invisibility (S4 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Gust Of Wind (S2 Evoc): 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to redirect the wind
Haste (S3 Tran): R30' Willing target gains double Speed, +2 Armor Class, advantage on Dexterity, and an additional action each turn for concentration up to 1 min and suffers 1 rd of incapacitation afterward
Hold Monster (S5 Ench): R90' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hold Person (S2 Ench): R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hypnotic Pattern (S3 Illu): R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects
Ice Knife (S1 Conj): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 1d10 HP piercing on a hit and 2d6 HP cold in a 5' radius (save Dexterity negates cold) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP cold]
Ice Storm (S4 Evoc): R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP bludgeoning]
Incendiary Cloud (S8 Conj): R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half), obscures, and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Insect Plague (S5 Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Invisibility (S2 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Jump (S1 Tran): Touched can jump 30' after a 10' move for 1 min
Knock (S2 Tran): R60' Unlocks, unsticks, or unbars the target or suppresses Arcane Lock for 10 min
Legend Lore (S5 [Draconic Spells] Divi): Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Levitate (S2 Tran): R60' Target 500 lb object or creature rises 20' (save Constitution negates) and can be moved up or down 20' each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Light (S0 Evoc): Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Lightning Bolt (S3 Evoc): 100'x5' line inflicts 8d6 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Mage Armor (S1 Abju): Willing, unarmored touched gains Armor Class 13 + Dexterity modifier for 8 hr; the spell ends if the target dons armor
Mage Hand (S0 Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Magic Missile (S1 Evoc): R120' 3 darts inflict 1d4+1 HP force each [+Level creates +1 dart]
Magic Weapon (S2 Tran): Touched weapon gains a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr [+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6]
Major Image (S3 Illu): R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4]
Mass Suggestion (S6 Ench): R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr; damage from self or any ally ends the effects [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9]
Mending (S0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Message (S0 Tran): R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 1' of wood, stone, or metal or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Meteor Swarm (S9 Evoc): R1 mile 4 40' radius areas each inflict 20d6 HP fire and 20d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Mind Spike (S2 Divi): R120' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Minor Illusion (S0 Illu): R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min
Mirror Image (S2 Illu): 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Misty Step (S2 Conj): Teleports self 30'
Move Earth (S6 Tran): R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 minutes for concentration up to 2 hr
Phantasmal Force (S2 Illu): R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Plane Shift (S7 Conj): Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Poison Spray (S0 Necr): R30' Ranged spell inflicts 2d12 HP poison
Polymorph (S4 Tran): R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast, with temporary hit points appropriate to the beast, (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 temporary hit points
Power Word Kill (S9 Ench): R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Stun (S8 Ench): R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others are have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Prestidigitation (S0 Tran): R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Prismatic Spray (S7 Evoc): 60' cone randomly inflicts one of: 12d6 HP fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold (save Dexterity half); restrained (save Dexterity negates) and petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates); blinded (save Dexterity negates) and banished to another plane (save Wisdom negates) at the start of the next turn; 2 of the preceding effects
Protection From Energy (S3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Ray Of Frost (S0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Ray Of Sickness (S1 Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned until the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Reverse Gravity (S7 Tran): R100' Items in a 100'x100' cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Scorching Ray (S2 Evoc): R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire [+Level gives +1 ranged attack]
See Invisibility (S2 Divi): Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
Seeming (S5 Illu): R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Shatter (S2 Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d8 HP thunder (save Constitution half; constructs have disadvantage) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Shield (S1 Abju): Cast as a reaction upon taking damage, gives self +5 Armor Class and immunity to Magic Missile until the start of the next turn
Shocking Grasp (S0 Evoc): Touch inflicts 2d8 HP lightning and loss of opportunity attacks until its next turn
Silent Image (S1 Illu): R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Sleep (S1 Ench): R60' Each target in a 5' radius becomes incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) until the end of its next turn, then unconscious (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min (damage or shaking awakens)
Sleet Storm (S3 Conj): R150' 20' radius obscures, douses exposed flames, and inflicts difficult terrain and prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Slow (S3 Tran): R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action per turn, and a 25% chance of somatic spell failure (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Sorcerous Burst (S0 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, psychic, or thunder; rolled 8s on the damage each inflict +1d8 HP, to a maximum of +2d8 HP
Spider Climb (S2 Tran): Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Stinking Cloud (S3 Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stoneskin (S4 Tran): Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Suggestion (S2 Ench): R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Summon Dragon (S5 [Draconic Spells] Conj): R60' Summons an obedient draconic spirit for concentration up to 1 hr; it has Armor Class 19, 50 hit points, 30' Speed, 60' fly Speed, 30' swim Speed, 2 attacks per rd that inflict 1d6 + 9 HP piercing, a breath weapon that inflicts 2d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison in a 30' cone, and resistance to the same damage type; self also gains this resistance [+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, number of attacks by 1 per 2 levels, and piercing damage by 1]
Sunbeam (S6 Evoc): 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd for concentration up to 1 min
Sunburst (S8 Evoc): R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; an additional save each turn ends blindness)
Telekinesis (S5 Tran): R60' Self can mentally restrain and move 1 Huge creature or object 30' (save Strength negates) each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Teleport (S7 Conj): R10' Teleports an unattended Large or smaller object or self and 8 willing creatures any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
Teleportation Circle (S5 Conj): R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Thunderwave (S1 Evoc): 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Time Stop (S9 Tran): Self can take 1d4+1 turns while no time passes for others; affecting another creature or moving more than 1000' away ends
Tongues (S3 Divi): Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
True Seeing (S6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
True Strike (S0 Divi): Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +6 attack bonus and inflicts +1d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
Vampiric Touch (S3 Necr): Touch inflicts 3d6 HP necrotic, and self regains half as many hit points, for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Vitriolic Sphere (S4 Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d4 HP acid, then 5d4 HP acid at the end of each affected creature's next turn (save Dexterity half initial HP only) [+Level inflicts +2d4 HP initial]
Wall Of Fire (S4 Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Wall Of Stone (S5 Evoc): R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity avoids entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Water Breathing (S3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Walk (S3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Web (S2 Conj): R60' 20' cube inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Dexterity negates; Athletics frees) for concentration up to 1 hr; burning the web inflicts 2d4 HP fire
Wish (S9 Conj): Mimics an 8th level spell or alters reality with few limits; casting to alter reality reduces Strength to 3 for 2d4 days and causes later spellcasting before a long rest to inflict 1d10 HP necrotic per spell level
Magic Notes:
Distant Spell: Can spend 1 Sorcery Point to double the range of a spell or to give a touch spell a 30' range
Elemental Affinity: Spells that deal a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison inflict +2 HP
Font Of Magic: Can use 10 Sorcery Points per long rest, convert spell slots to Sorcery Points, and use a bonus action to convert Sorcery Points to a spell slot
Heightened Spell: Can spend 2 Sorcery Points to inflict disadvantage on a target's saves vs. a self spell
Innate Sorcery: Can use a bonus action to gain +1 spell DC and advantage on spell attacks for 1 min 2 times per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Seeking Spell: Can spend 1 Sorcery Point to reroll a failed spell attack
Sorcerous Restoration: Taking a short rest restores 5 Sorcery Points once per long rest
Sorcery Incarnate: Can spend 2 Sorcery Points for additional uses of Innate Sorcery, and can use 2 Metamagic options on each spell
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the sorcerer spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
